chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-906 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of bail application 12-02-2024 M/s Syed Jaffar Ali Shah and Abdul Rauf Abro, Advocates for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press this bail application and submits that he would be satisfied if directions are issued to the trial Court to examine the material witnesses and thereafter applicant may repeat his bail application on the basis of such material. Learned Deputy P.G has recorded no objection to this proposal. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the trial Court is directed to record evidence of material witnesses, particularly complainant within a period of two months, after which the applicant would be at liberty to file fresh bail application before the trial Court which shall be decided on its own merits, independent of the impugned order and report compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
